userA.login_result: FAIL - rate limited (429) then API down (502)

userB.login_result: FAIL - API down (502) - 'Something went wrong. Please try again.'

test_cases.name: User A (owner-pro) login via Chrome
test_cases.command: Navigate to /login, fill owner-pro@doable.me / TestPass123!, click Sign in
test_cases.actual: Error: 'Too many requests, please try again later.' (HTTP 429), then 'Something went wrong. Please try again.' (HTTP 502 from API)

test_cases.name: User B (ws-member) login via Playwright
test_cases.command: Navigate to /login, fill ws-member@doable.me / TestPass123!, click Sign in
test_cases.actual: Error: 'Something went wrong. Please try again.' (HTTP 502 from API)

test_cases.name: dev.doable.me web frontend health check
test_cases.actual: HTTP 200 OK - Landing page loads correctly

test_cases.name: Preview WebSocket connection
test_cases.command: Open project editor, observe preview WebSocket
test_cases.actual: WebSocket handshake fails with 502 Bad Gateway, retries continuously

test_cases.name: Runtime metrics endpoint
test_cases.actual: HTTP 404 - endpoint not found. Client continues polling on 404 (loop bug)

test_cases.name: Design mode - both users see each other's changes
test_cases.command: Both users open same project in design mode
test_cases.expected: Real-time change propagation via Yjs CRDT
test_cases.actual: BLOCKED - could not log in either user due to API 502

test_cases.name: Cursor presence - User A sees User B cursor
test_cases.command: Both users in same editor, move cursors
test_cases.expected: Cursor position visible for other user with color indicator
test_cases.actual: BLOCKED - could not log in either user due to API 502

test_cases.name: Live editing - User A edit visible to User B
test_cases.command: User A edits file, User B sees change without refresh
test_cases.expected: Yjs CRDT propagates edit via WS within <1s
test_cases.actual: BLOCKED - could not log in either user due to API 502

test_cases.name: Shared preview - code change visible in both previews
test_cases.command: User A changes code, both users see updated preview
test_cases.expected: Preview updates for both users within a few seconds

test_cases.name: Workspace sharing between accounts
test_cases.command: Owner-pro shares workspace with ws-member, verify access levels
test_cases.expected: ws-member can access shared workspace with member permissions
test_cases.actual: BLOCKED - could not log in either user due to API 502

test_cases.name: Simultaneous AI chat from two users
test_cases.command: Both users send AI messages in same project simultaneously
test_cases.expected: No conflicts, both responses delivered correctly
test_cases.actual: BLOCKED - could not log in either user due to API 502

test_cases.name: Rate limit error message quality
test_cases.expected: Message includes retry-after time (e.g. 'Try again in 2 minutes')
test_cases.actual: Generic message: 'Too many requests, please try again later.' - no retry time given

bugs: BUG-COLLAB-001: Login rate limiter too aggressive (429 after ~5 attempts, long lockout, no retry-after)
BUG-COLLAB-002: CRITICAL - dev-api.doable.me returns 502 on all endpoints (API server down)
BUG-COLLAB-003: Login shows generic 'Something went wrong' for 502/503 errors (poor UX)
BUG-COLLAB-004: Preview WebSocket returns 502, client retries infinitely
BUG-COLLAB-005: /projects/{id}/runtime/metrics returns 404, client polls 404 in tight loop
BUG-COLLAB-006: /{projectId}/github/status returns 404 (possible routing issue - no /projects/ prefix)
notes: All collaborative features (design mode, cursor presence, live editing, shared preview, AI chat) are BLOCKED by BUG-COLLAB-002
WS server (dev-ws.doable.me) is healthy - only API is down
Rate limiting (BUG-COLLAB-001) was triggered by previous test sessions from same IP before API went down
Yjs/presence/collaboration infrastructure could not be tested at all due to API 502
